title: No More Map Markers
body:
_Have you ever been on a mission to make the perfect map for your living room, but suddenly a pesky green map marker ruins everything?_

This resource pack fixes that!\
(Note: This only removes the green map markers that are created by maps in item frames)

This is also helpful on versions before 1.21, where map markers stay perminent, even after the item frame is removed. ([MC-252817](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-252817))

There are two very different versions of this resource pack. You can go to versions to pick whichever you like more.

## No Markers
Completely removes the green map markers  
[Download Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/no-more-map-markers/versions)

![Green Map Markers are completely invisible](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ec2ce55cfcb9280318ffc46e69746d922b9b5bb.png)

## Small Markers
Replaces the green map markers with a smaller, less intrusive texture  
[Download Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/no-more-map-markers/versions)

![Green Map Markers are smaller and less intrusive](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d70a40898b97d11ced17b56fecbe8a83874d78c1.png)

Feel free to add to any modpacks
